description_long: This office building is a tall, modern high-rise structure with a striking facade featuring alternating horizontal bands of dark blue glass and white concrete or composite panels. The front face is characterized by a large, asymmetrical blue glass section that is offset by white horizontal stripes, creating a dynamic and contemporary appearance. The building has a stepped profile, with a recessed upper section and a prominent flat roof, possibly housing mechanical equipment or a rooftop terrace. Windows are arranged in a regular, grid-like pattern, with the majority of glazing concentrated on the front and side facades, while the rear is mostly solid with small, evenly spaced window slits. The base of the building is slightly wider, providing stability and a subtle podium effect. The overall design suggests a commercial office use, with a focus on maximizing natural light and visual impact in an urban environment.
description: A tall, modern office building with alternating blue glass and white panel bands, featuring a dynamic, asymmetrical facade and a stepped roofline. The structure emphasizes contemporary design with regular window patterns and a prominent glass front.
description_view_0: The front view showcases the bold, asymmetrical blue glass facade with horizontal white stripes and a recessed upper section.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the building's narrow profile, with the horizontal banding and blue glass continuing along the side.
description_view_2: The rear view is mostly solid white with small, evenly spaced vertical window slits and minimal glazing.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the narrow profile and continuation of the horizontal banding and glass.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular horizontal bands of rectangular windows, alternating with solid white panels, with a large asymmetrical glass section on the front facade and small vertical window slits on the rear.
